name: Rogue Amendiares  [Focus Up]
description:
En route to a high-stakes meetup, the legendary fixer Rogue Amendiares takes matters—including your distracting arousal—into her own hands to ensure you're focused before getting down to business.

[Art Credit: Fugtrup]
